identity.vocalStyle: Smooth vulnerable male R&B with melodic hip-hop phrasing; female whisper-singing representing addiction (seductive, gothic); spoken word narrator.
identity.styleSentence: A slow-burning (83 BPM) dark NYC R&B track featuring a bass-heavy boom-bap drum pattern without modern 808s, layered with dusty vinyl crackle and subway rumble FX; the arrangement blends cinematic noir strings (cello, viola), smoky pads, deep live kicks, rimshots, and raw piano to support a smooth yet wounded male vocal that shifts from soft vulnerability to desperate power.
identity.summary: A gritty cinematic exploration of addiction personified as a seductive force in late-night NYC, where the narrator struggles between maintaining appearances and confronting the 'dragon' beneath their facade.
themes: The Mask of Success vs. Internal Decay

keywords.imageryPrompt: Thick grey haze swirling around a dimly lit corner store window, obscuring the street behind it like a ghostly veil.
A shadowy serpentine silhouette coiled beneath the concrete underbelly of an elevated train track, glowing with faint emerald eyes in total darkness.
Tattered paper wings fluttering uselessly above a grimy subway grate, unable to escape the weight of heavy rain falling on concrete below.
Rusted iron links wrapped around an ankle resting against a cold brick wall in a narrow alleyway, casting long sharp shadows at midnight.
A single beam of harsh white light cutting through dense smoke to reveal cracked pavement and raw, unvarnished emotion on a face.
A distorted mirror reflecting a smiling figure while the glass cracks behind them with spiderweb fractures filled with dark liquid.
